prestazioni: Replace the stock 1622cc B-Series (BMC B-Series 1622) inline-4 with a fully balanced and blueprinted version featuring a forged crankshaft (T&J Performance 89mm stroke), forged Mahle pistons (80.26mm bore, 10.5:1 compression), and Cunningham con-rods (5.75" length) for high-RPM reliability up to 7,500 RPM. Pair with a custom-ground camshaft (Kent Cams 286° duration, 0.450" lift) and adjustable vernier timing gear for optimized overlap and mid-range torque.

Install a bespoke fuel system comprising dual 45mm Weber DCOE sidedraft carburetors (jetted with 155 main jets, 180 air correctors, and 45F9 emulsion tubes) on a custom-fabricated intake manifold (MGA Guru aluminum 4-into-1 design) with velocity stacks (K&N 3" long) for improved throttle response. Include a Facet Silver Top 12V fuel pump and -6AN braided lines with AN-8 fittings for consistent fuel delivery under lateral G-forces.

Upgrade the braking system with a Wilwood Superlite 6R 4-piston caliper kit (12.19" vented rotors) on the front and a Wilwood Dynalite 2-piston kit (11" solid rotors) on the rear, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel brake lines. Retain the original drum-in-hat rear setup but upgrade to EBC Greenstuff shoes for improved fade resistance.
estetica: Replace the stock steel wheels with a set of 15x6" Minilite replica magnesium wheels (ET25 offset) wrapped in 185/60R15 Avon CR6ZZ semi-slick tires for period-correct aesthetics with modern grip. Powder-coat the wheels in satin silver to match the original MGA color codes (e.g., Almond Green or Old English White).

Install a custom fiberglass front splitter (MGA Guru "Le Mans" style) and a rear ducktail spoiler (Fiberfab 1960s endurance replica) to reduce lift at speed, paired with a full-width aluminum belly pan (hand-fabricated) to smooth underbody airflow. Paint all aero components in gloss black with a single gold pinstripe for contrast.

Retrofit the interior with a full leather retrim (Connolly Vaumol hide in tan) featuring diamond-stitched door cards, a Moto-Lita 13" suede steering wheel (3-spoke, 15" diameter), and a custom roll cage (Sparco Pro2000 6-point, bolt-in) with padded harness bar. Replace the stock gauges with a Smiths Chronometric tachometer (8,000 RPM redline) and oil pressure/fuel level gauges (Veglia Borletti 60mm diameter).
